title: TaskRequest
description: Milestone-1 text-to-text request contract for Mode 1 run().

schemaVersion.description: Contract schema version used to interpret the request payload.

requestId.description: Optional caller-provided idempotency/debug identifier for this request.

task.description: Task descriptor used by routing and provider capability matching.

kind.description: Milestone-1 task kind for text input to text output.

prompt.description: Single text prompt input for simple text-to-text execution.

messages.description: Conversation-style text input for chat-like text-to-text execution.

items.description: One message in the conversation input.

maxOutputTokens.description: Optional upper bound for generated output tokens.

temperature.description: Optional randomness hint where 0 is most deterministic and 2 is highest supported variance.

seed.description: Optional deterministic generation seed when supported by the provider.

stop.description: Optional stop sequences that should end generation when matched.

policy.description: Execution policy constraints used by the router.

execution.description: Required execution target for milestone routing.

telemetry.description: Caller telemetry preferences for this request.

consent.description: Whether the caller consents to telemetry collection for this request.

tags.description: Optional caller-provided non-secret labels for telemetry correlation.

authContextRef.description: Reference to a secure credential slot. Raw credentials must not be placed in the request.
